prompt: Create a cinematic photorealistic medieval fantasy scene titled Audience with the King: inside a vast Gothic throne hall, a seated king is seen from behind in the lower right foreground, facing two dignified petitioners standing before him. The two central figures are a female knight in full polished silver plate armor with ornate engravings, chainmail details, gauntlets, boots, sword at her side, and a pale white cloak, and a tall prince or nobleman wearing an immaculate white military-style ceremonial suit with gold embroidery, gold buttons, epaulettes, braided chains, belt, and a white cape. The nobleman has long dark wavy hair; the knight has blonde hair tied up. Count exactly 3 main foreground characters: the king, the armored female knight, and the white-clad nobleman. Count exactly 8 background guards or courtiers, arranged symmetrically in dark armor and formal medieval dress along both sides behind the central pair, holding spears or standing at attention. The king wears a dark navy and gold brocade robe and an ornate golden crown, seated on a black-and-gold carved throne with gilded finials and scrollwork. The hall has towering pointed arches, a bright stained-glass lancet window centered in the background, tall dark blue banners with gold heraldic crests, candlelit candelabras, smoky atmospheric light rays, marble columns, and a glossy black-and-white patterned stone floor reflecting the figures. Use dramatic backlighting from the window, warm candle highlights, deep shadows, shallow cinematic depth of field, ultra-detailed costumes, realistic fabric, metal reflections, and a solemn royal-audience mood. Composition should be vertical 4:5, eye-level from slightly behind the king, with the two petitioners centered and full body visible. No text, no watermark, no modern objects.
